understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based puzzle, completing all goal cells in each level to advance. To complete a goal cell, the player's carried piece must match the goal's required shape, color, and rotation simultaneously. The player must manage stamina to avoid losing lives and ultimately reach the exit by solving all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves in four directions (north, south, east, west) on a grid, spending one stamina per successful move. If stamina reaches zero, a life is lost and stamina resets (to 42 in this case). Losing all lives ends the game. Modifier tiles automatically change the player's piece: shape changer cycles through shapes, color changer cycles colors, rotation changer rotates the piece 90° clockwise. The player's current piece attributes (shape, color, rotation) must match a goal cell's requirements exactly to complete it. Walls block movement, and unsuccessful moves still consume stamina. The interface shows goal positions, required attributes, and the locations of nearby modifier tiles that can fix mismatches.

Agent explained goal and mechanics.

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal of the game is to navigate a grid-based puzzle, completing all goal cells in each level to advance. To complete a goal cell, the player's carried piece must match the goal's required shape, color, and rotation simultaneously. The player must manage stamina to avoid losing lives and ultimately reach the exit by solving all levels.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: The player moves in four directions (north, south, east, west) on a grid, spending one stamina per successful move. If stamina reaches zero, a life is lost and stamina resets (to 42 in this case). Losing all lives ends the game. Modifier tiles automatically change the player's piece: shape changer cycles through shapes, color changer cycles colors, rotation changer rotates the piece 90° clockwise. The player's current piece attributes (shape, color, rotation) must match a goal cell's requirements exactly to complete it. Walls block movement, and unsuccessful moves still consume stamina. The interface shows goal positions, required attributes, and the locations of nearby modifier tiles that can fix mismatches.
